MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GIOVANNIE MONTOYA'S Motion To Compel Defendant Sogolon Djata To Provide Responses To Plaintiff Montoya Form Interrogatories - General, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions is continued to September 10, 2015 at 10:00 a.m., to give Plaintiff Giovannie Montoya ("Montoya") the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Montoya must deliver courtesy copies of the motion papers to Pro Tem Judge Douglas Robbins at WOOD ROBBINS LLP, 1 Post Street, Suite 800, San Francisco, CA 94104, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 3, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the Motion will be DENIED. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). Montoya is further ordered to serve this order on all other parties to this action. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
